summary: BIFFA PLC (LEI: 2138008RB4WDK7HYYS91; GB Companies House: 10336040) is identifier-confirmed and registered in the United Kingdom. GLEIF Level 2 data indicates that BIFFA PLC holds a direct accounting-consolidation relationship with BIFFA WASTE SERVICES LIMITED as a subsidiary, while Bears Bidco is recorded as holding a shareholding in Biffa Ltd per OpenSanctions; however, GLEIF reports a reporting exception at the parent level, meaning no known person can be identified as the ultimate owner of BIFFA PLC. Key officers recorded at BIFFA LIMITED via OpenCorporates include MICHAEL ROBERT MASON TOPHAM (board appointment from 2016-08-18), MARC ANTHONY ANGELL (board appointment from 2024-11-01), and SARAH PARSONS (senior managing official from 2019-07-11). Two structural risk signals are noted: an opaque ownership signal of medium confidence derived from GLEIF, reflecting an unknown person in the ownership chain; and a non-EU/EEA jurisdiction signal of high confidence from OpenCorporates, as the ownership chain reaches into Great Britain, a condition flagged under AMLA CDD RTS condition (b). A material limitation applies: OpenSanctions data is licensed under CC-BY-NC-4.0, and commercial re-use of that data is not permitted under the source licence.

claims.text: BIFFA PLC (LEI: 2138008RB4WDK7HYYS91; GB Companies House: 10336040) is identifier-confirmed and registered in the United Kingdom.
GLEIF Level 2 data indicates that BIFFA PLC holds a direct accounting-consolidation (direct-child) relationship with BIFFA WASTE SERVICES LIMITED as a subsidiary.
Bears Bidco is recorded as holding a shareholding in Biffa Ltd per OpenSanctions.
GLEIF reports a reporting exception at the parent level, meaning no known person can be identified as the ultimate owner of BIFFA PLC.
MICHAEL ROBERT MASON TOPHAM holds a board appointment at BIFFA LIMITED from 2016-08-18, per OpenCorporates.
MARC ANTHONY ANGELL holds a board appointment at BIFFA LIMITED from 2024-11-01, per OpenCorporates.
SARAH PARSONS holds a senior managing official role at BIFFA LIMITED from 2019-07-11, per OpenCorporates.
An opaque ownership structural risk signal of medium confidence is raised by GLEIF, reflecting an unknown person in the ownership chain of BIFFA PLC.
A non-EU/EEA jurisdiction structural risk signal of high confidence is raised by OpenCorporates, as the ownership chain reaches into Great Britain (GB), flagged under AMLA CDD RTS condition (b).
A material limitation applies: OpenSanctions data is licensed under CC-BY-NC-4.0, and commercial re-use of that data is not permitted under the source licence.
